metadata.title: Freelance Payment Communication Guide | FlowDockr
metadata.description: Start with the right payment guide, move into a reusable template, and finish with a live scenario for overdue invoices, deposits, and payment follow-ups.

hero.title: Freelance payment communication, organized by decision stage.
hero.description: This is FlowDockr's payment cluster hub. Start with the guide that matches your situation, move into a template when you need wording, and then use a scenario page for the live client message.

guides.title: Start with the payment task you need to solve
guides.description: These three guides own the core payment questions in phase 1. Read the guide first when you need judgment, sequencing, or a clean decision path.

items.title: How to follow up an unpaid invoice
items.description: Use this when an invoice is open and you need the first clear follow-up before the thread gets more tense.

items.title: How to remind a client about overdue payment
items.description: Use this when the due date has passed and the reminder now needs more urgency and structure.

items.title: When to ask for a deposit before work
items.description: Use this when you need to protect kickoff with a clear deposit rule instead of starting on promises.

flow.label: Cluster flow
flow.title: The payment cluster works in a fixed hierarchy
flow.description: Use the hub for orientation, the guide for decision-making, the template for wording, and the scenario for the live execution step.

items.title: Pick the right guide
items.description: Choose the payment situation: unpaid invoice, overdue reminder, or deposit timing.

items.title: Use the matching template
items.description: Move to a structured wording page when you know what kind of message you need to send.

items.title: Finish in the scenario
items.description: Open the live scenario page when the conversation has real pressure, risk, or timing stakes.

execution.title: Templates and live scenarios
execution.description: These are the first execution nodes connected to the payment guides in phase 1.

items.title: Payment reminder templates
items.description: Three overdue follow-up styles with usage boundaries and a direct path into the overdue invoice scenario.

items.title: Advance payment message examples
items.description: Three deposit and advance-payment approaches for pre-kickoff messages.

items.title: Overdue invoice no-response scenario
items.description: Use this when payment is overdue and the client has stopped replying.

items.title: Deposit not paid yet scenario
items.description: Use this when kickoff is blocked because the promised deposit still has not arrived.

cta.title: Enter the payment cluster from the correct page type.
cta.description: If you need judgment, start with a guide. If you need copy, open a template. If the message is already live and high-pressure, go straight to the scenario.
